projects.name: Trabzon — Körfez Yatırımcı Talebi
projects.summary_en: Trabzon prices up 340% in 3 years driven by Qatari and Saudi demand. Still 60% below Istanbul comparables. Sea view residential commanding strong premium. Direct flights from Gulf cities expanding.
projects.summary_ru: Цены в Трабзоне выросли на 340% за 3 года — спрос катарских и саудовских покупателей. Всё ещё на 60% ниже сопоставимых объектов в Стамбуле. Жильё с видом на море с высокой премией.
projects.summary_ar: أسعار طرابزون ارتفعت 340% في 3 سنوات بسبب الطلب القطري والسعودي. لا تزال أقل بنسبة 60% من المقارنات الاسطنبولية. المساكن ذات إطلالة البحر تحقق علاوة قوية.
projects.summary_tr: Trabzon fiyatları 3 yılda yüzde 340 arttı — Katar ve Suudi talebiyle. Hâlâ İstanbul emsallerinin yüzde 60 altında. Deniz manzaralı konut güçlü prim yapıyor.

key_events.event_en: Qatar Airways direct Doha-Trabzon route launched
Gulf buyer surge — Trabzon tops foreign purchase charts
Saudi Investment Authority acquires Trabzon hotel portfolio
Direct flights from 12 Gulf cities — record connections

risk_factors: Gulf demand concentrated — single buyer group dependency
Limited local rental demand — holiday market only
projects.tradia_verdict: BUY — Ortahisar sea view apartments for immediate Gulf buyer resale. Akçaabat land for medium-term hold. Strong momentum intact.

projects.name: Rize-Artvin — Havalimanı ve Hidroelektrik Bölgesi
projects.summary_en: Rize-Artvin Airport opened 2023 on reclaimed Black Sea land — engineering marvel. Multiple hydroelectric investments transforming eastern Black Sea economy. Early-stage opportunity with significant upside.
projects.summary_ru: Аэропорт Ризе-Артвин открылся в 2023 году на намывной территории Чёрного моря — инженерное чудо. Множество гидроэнергетических инвестиций трансформируют экономику восточного Черноморья.
projects.summary_ar: مطار ريزه-أرتفين افتُتح عام 2023 على أرض مستصلحة من البحر الأسود — معجزة هندسية. استثمارات هيدروكهربائية متعددة تحوّل اقتصاد شرق البحر الأسود.
projects.summary_tr: Rize-Artvin Havalimanı 2023'te Karadeniz'den kazanılan alanda açıldı — mühendislik harikası. Çok sayıda hidroelektrik yatırımı doğu Karadeniz ekonomisini dönüştürüyor.

key_events.event_en: Airport construction starts on sea platform
Rize-Artvin Airport opens — first sea platform airport
Free trade zone application Rize submitted

risk_factors: Free trade zone approval uncertain timeline
projects.tradia_verdict: WATCH — Early stage. Rize commercial for patient capital. Monitor free trade zone approval — trigger for BUY signal.

projects.name: Samsun — Karadeniz Lojistik ve Ticaret Merkezi
projects.name_en: Samsun — Black Sea Logistics & Trade Hub
projects.summary_en: Samsun emerging as Turkey's primary Black Sea trade gateway. Port modernisation complete — 15M ton annual capacity. Rail connection to Central Asia via Trans-Caspian route generating sustained industrial demand.
projects.summary_ru: Самсун становится главными воротами Турции в Чёрное море. Модернизация порта завершена — 15 млн тонн в год. Железнодорожное соединение с Центральной Азией генерирует устойчивый промышленный спрос.
projects.summary_ar: سامسون يبرز كبوابة تركيا الرئيسية للبحر الأسود. اكتمل تحديث الميناء — 15 مليون طن سنوياً. الاتصال بالسكك الحديدية مع آسيا الوسطى يولّد طلباً صناعياً مستداماً.
projects.summary_tr: Samsun Türkiye'nin birincil Karadeniz ticaret kapısı olarak öne çıkıyor. Liman modernizasyonu tamamlandı — yıllık 15 milyon ton kapasite. Orta Asya'ya demiryolu bağlantısı süregelen sanayi talebini besliyor.

key_events.event_en: Samsun OSB Phase 4 — 200 new industrial lots
Grain corridor agreement — Samsun primary port

risk_factors: Geopolitical risk — Black Sea trade route dependency
projects.tradia_verdict: WATCH — Tekkeköy industrial land solid value. Better suited for Turkish domestic investors. International buyers prefer Trabzon for lifestyle premium.
